Intraday post (02/Feb)

Weekly post:

Warsh, Gold, Sentiment | Weekly post (02-06/Feb)

Describing the bubble, the coming crisis, market, economy and geo context:

Let’s look at the daily positioning…

INTRADAY POST Coding today’s positioning:

Net speed profile is flat-to-negative today, customers selling volatility both ways, but slightly more to the downside. Upside vvol is heavily sold by customers. SPX is at 6920 now.

Centroid is at 6914.30, literally no mechanical impact at this point, only during the powerhour, some weak magnet.

Downside pivot is at 6894.22with target of 6831.07This zone is very supportive, however, there is a local vanna flip at 6860/65 zone, that is expected to reject the spot. It has a high impact (like 60-70% for a reversion), back towards the pivot primarly. The pivot is sticky, and a local pin.

Upside pivot is at 6920.84with target of 6964.87The upside target is a reversion potential back towards the pivot at max, but 6950 has a strong magnetic effect.

Take vanna flip as a “line in the sand”. Over all the market is set to rangebound, and being supportied above 6700 as the weekly post said. I see no edge today, only premium selling.

OptionsDepth Heatmap
